messages.content: Always use code blocks with the appropriate language tags. If asked for a table always format it using Markdown syntax.
clink vs cmder vs ConEmu tools in table please and be short

| Tool   | Description                                                  |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| clink  | A command-line completion and history library for Windows    |
| cmder  | A portable console emulator for Windows                       |
| ConEmu | A customizable tabbed terminal emulator and console manager  |
can you but line between each row in the .md table you wrote?

Sure, here's the updated table with lines between each row:

| Tool   | Description                                                  |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| clink  | A command-line completion and history library for Windows    |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| cmder  | A portable console emulator for Windows                       |
|--------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| ConEmu | A customizable tabbed terminal emulator and console manager  |
